overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The player approaches a massive megabuilding, passes through its shadowy underpass adorned with bright neon advertisements, and emerges into a sunlit open plaza.

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the massive megabuilding ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the pedestrian street toward the massive archway building

notable_agents.action: bald man in denim vest walking ahead on the right side
yellow taxi driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive futuristic building with archway entrance dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the center median of the street
modern angular glass skyscraper with reflective surfaces
open-air parking structure with multiple visible levels
tall cylindrical digital advertising pillars displaying blue graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit futuristic city street with a massive megabuilding arching overhead in the distance. The camera walks forward past palm trees and modern glass towers, approaching the shadow of the central structure while pedestrians and vehicles move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under megabuilding overhang

events.description: significant darkening as the camera moves deep under the building overhang
approaching the neon-lit billboard area under the megabuilding

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the massive building overhang as natural light fades and neon becomes visible

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and sunglasses walking past the camera
person with bright green hair and colorful outfit walking toward camera

entered.detail: yellow and white concrete dividers lining the edge of the walkway
large horizontal digital billboard displaying cartoon chef character and ALL FOODS text
corporate advertisement for Delamain AI services with company logo

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the shadow of the megabuilding, transitioning from bright sunlight to a darker, sheltered environment. Large digital billboards for ALL FOODS and DELAMAIN become visible overhead as the surroundings darken and the street narrows under the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass with massive digital advertising displays

events.description: neon advertisements become fully illuminated and dominant in the dark underpass
bright daylight visible ahead at the exit of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark underpass beneath glowing neon billboards toward the distant exit

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead toward the underpass exit

entered.detail: digital advertisement asking GOT CHROME? with neural processor text
large rectangular concrete blocks placed along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Deep under the megabuilding, the scene is dominated by artificial neon light from massive overhead billboards advertising ALL FOODS, DELAMAIN, and GOT CHROME. The environment is enclosed and dark, with the camera moving toward a bright exit visible in the distance while passing concrete barriers and planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza exiting the underpass

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into bright open sunlight

agents.ego_description: emerging from the dark underpass back into the bright sunlight of the open plaza

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings visible in the open area ahead
modern storefronts and office towers lining the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dark underpass into a bright, open plaza. The massive megabuilding now looms on the left while futuristic skyscrapers and commercial buildings fill the view ahead. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial neon back to natural sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit city street through the oppressive shadow of a megabuilding and back into a bright open plaza. It begins by walking past palm trees and glass towers toward a massive structure arching overhead, moving steadily from the open daylight into a deepening shadow. As the camera enters the sheltered underpass, the natural light fades and is replaced by the glow of large digital billboards for All Foods and Delamain. The scene then becomes fully enclosed and dark, dominated by artificial neon advertisements for Got Chrome and All Foods, before the camera pushes forward toward a distant point of light. Finally, the view breaks open as the camera exits the underpass, shifting dramatically from neon hues back to natural sunlight within a wide plaza flanked by futuristic skyscrapers.
